name: GAF_SyteLine_MaterialSearch_Tool_v1
description: Search for existing BOM materials (components) on a standard job in SyteLine

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /load/SLJobmatls
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Query Parameters:
Parameter: properties
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: Comma-separated list of properties to return. Use: Job,Suffix,OperNum,Sequence,Item,Description,MatlQtyConv,UM,MatlType,Units,RefType,AltGroup,_ItemId
Parameter: filter
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: SQL WHERE clause. Example: Job = '         2' AND Suffix = 0
Parameter: orderby
Format: STRING
Required: False
Description: Sort order. Use: OperNum ASC, Sequence ASC
Parameter: recordCap
Format: INTEGER
Required: False
Description: Maximum records to return. Default: 50
Example Request:
Search materials for job 2:
GET /load/SLJobmatls?properties=Job,Suffix,OperNum,Sequence,Item,Description,MatlQtyConv,UM,MatlType,Units,RefType,AltGroup,_ItemId&filter=Job = '         2' AND Suffix = 0&orderby=OperNum ASC, Sequence ASC
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object containing an Items array with material records.
Key Response Fields:
- Items: Array of material objects (empty if none found)
- Job: Job number
- OperNum: Operation number this material belongs to
- Sequence: Sequence within the operation
- Item: Component/child item code
- Description: Material description
- MatlQtyConv: Quantity per parent unit
- UM: Unit of measure
- MatlType: 'M'=Material, 'T'=Tool, 'O'=Other
- RefType: 'I'=Inventory, 'J'=Job (sub-assembly), 'P'=Phantom
- AltGroup: Alternate group number
- _ItemId: Record identifier
- Success: Boolean indicating API success
NOTE: Job numbers are left-padded with spaces to 10 chars.
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Use this tool to search for existing BOM materials (components) on a standard job.
Materials are the child items/components that make up a parent item's BOM.
Filter by Job number and Suffix=0 for standard jobs.
NOTE: Job numbers are left-padded with spaces to 10 characters.
RefType values: 'I'=Inventory item, 'J'=Sub-assembly (has its own BOM), 'P'=Phantom

SITE PARAMETER (REQUIRED):
- The <site> placeholder must be filled with the site value from the agent's input
- Format: [TENANT]_DALS (e.g., '<YOUR_SITE>')
